name: vocab-master
description: Vocabulary learning app with spaced repetition

scripts.start: npm run dev:db && concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.dev: npm run dev:db && concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/frontend && npm run build -w apps/backend
scripts.migrate: cd apps/backend && npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.migrate:init: cd apps/backend && npx prisma migrate dev --name init
scripts.migrate:prod: cd apps/backend && npx prisma migrate deploy
scripts.setup: npm install && npm run dev:db && npm run generate && npm run migrate:init && npm run seed
scripts.setup:full: npm run dev:db && npm run generate && npm run migrate:init && npm run seed
